case_title: AL-OBAIDY, YASSER VS JEMAI, AMINE MOHAMED et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AL-OBAIDY, YASSER RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JEMAI, AMINE MOHAMED EL MOUSSARRIF, MOHAMMED DBA SIDIBOU RESTAURANT. $5,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $72.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $5,072.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF JAN-16-2004, GRANTED

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY AL-OBAIDY, YASSER AS TO DEFENDANT JEMAI, AMINE MOHAMED EL MOUSSARRIF, MOHAMMED DBA SIDIBOU RESTAURANT. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-03-2003 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-03-2003, CONTINUED BY COURT TO FEB-20-2004 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT EL MOUSSARRIF, MOHAMMED DBA SIDIBOU RESTAURANT.
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION FEB-20-2004, OFF CALENDAR
